title: gilia montana
intro: Gilia montana, also known as Sky Pilot, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gilia montana include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Gilia montana typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
